products.title: Products
products.subtitle: Premium quality products for global markets
products.product_desc_detail: Our products are manufactured in ISO 9001 certified facilities, ensuring consistent quality and reliability. Each unit undergoes rigorous testing before shipment.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Your trusted partner in global trade since 2010
about.story_p1: Founded in 2010, we have grown from a small trading company into a comprehensive global sourcing partner serving clients across 50+ countries and regions.
about.story_p2: We specialize in industrial equipment, power tools, household appliances, testing instruments, and cleaning machinery. Our team of 200+ professionals ensures quality control, timely delivery, and competitive pricing for every order.
about.story_p3: With annual export volume exceeding $150 million, we are committed to building long-term partnerships based on trust, quality, and mutual growth.
about.value_integrity_desc: We believe in transparency and honesty in every transaction, building trust that lasts.
about.value_quality_desc: Every product undergoes rigorous quality control to meet international standards.
about.value_innovation_desc: We continuously improve our processes and embrace new technologies to serve you better.
about.cta_desc: Contact us today for a free consultation and product catalog.
about.value1_desc: We believe in transparency and honesty in every transaction, building trust that lasts.
about.value2_desc: Every product undergoes rigorous quality control to meet international standards.
about.value3_desc: We continuously improve our processes and embrace new technologies to serve you better.

knowledge.title: Knowledge Base
knowledge.subtitle: Expert answers to common questions about sourcing, shipping, and quality control
knowledge.cta_title: Can't find what you're looking for?
knowledge.cta_desc: Try our AI assistant for instant answers
knowledge.faq_cert: What certifications do your products have?
knowledge.faq_cert_a: Our products are certified with CE, RoHS, and ISO 9001 standards. Many products also have UL, FCC, and CSA certifications depending on the product category and target market. We can provide certificates upon request.
knowledge.faq_moq: What is your MOQ (Minimum Order Quantity)?
knowledge.faq_moq_a: MOQ varies by product category. For standard power tools, MOQ starts at 100-500 units. For large industrial equipment, MOQ can be as low as 1-5 units. Contact our sales team for product-specific MOQ information.
knowledge.faq_lead: What are your typical lead times?
knowledge.faq_lead_a: Standard lead times range from 15-30 days for stock items and 30-45 days for custom/OEM orders. Lead time depends on order quantity, product complexity, and current production schedule.
knowledge.faq_oem_a: Yes, we offer comprehensive OEM and ODM services. Our engineering team can work with your specifications to develop custom products. Minimum order quantities for OEM start at 500-1000 units depending on complexity.
knowledge.faq_payment: What payment terms do you accept?
knowledge.faq_payment_a: We accept T/T (wire transfer), L/C (letter of credit), and for established partners, D/P or D/A. Standard terms are 30% deposit with 70% before shipment. Negotiable for long-term partners.
knowledge.faq_quality: How do you ensure product quality?
knowledge.faq_quality_a: We implement a 4-stage QC process: (1) Raw material inspection, (2) In-production random checks, (3) Pre-shipment inspection (PSI) by our QC team, (4) Container loading supervision. Third-party inspection (SGS, Bureau Veritas) is available upon request.
knowledge.faq_shipping: What shipping methods do you offer?
knowledge.faq_shipping_a: We offer sea freight (FCL/LCL), air freight, and express shipping (DHL, FedEx, UPS). Sea freight is most economical for large orders. Air freight recommended for urgent orders (3-7 days). Express for samples and small parcels (5-10 days).
knowledge.faq_sample: Do you provide samples before mass production?
knowledge.faq_sample_a: Yes, we provide samples. Stock samples are available within 3-5 days. Custom samples take 10-15 days. Sample cost is negotiable and typically refundable for bulk orders.
knowledge.faq_warranty_a: Standard warranty is 12 months from shipment date for manufacturing defects. Extended warranties available for select products. We maintain a spare parts inventory for post-warranty support.
knowledge.q1_q: What certifications do your products have?
knowledge.q1_a: Our products are certified with CE, RoHS, and ISO 9001 standards. Many products also have UL, FCC, and CSA certifications depending on the product category and target market. We can provide certificates upon request.
knowledge.q2_q: What is your MOQ (Minimum Order Quantity)?
knowledge.q2_a: MOQ varies by product category. For standard power tools, MOQ starts at 100-500 units. For large industrial equipment, MOQ can be as low as 1-5 units. Contact our sales team for product-specific MOQ information.
knowledge.q3_q: What are your typical lead times?
knowledge.q3_a: Standard lead times range from 15-30 days for stock items and 30-45 days for custom/OEM orders. Lead time depends on order quantity, product complexity, and current production schedule.
knowledge.q4_a: Yes, we offer comprehensive OEM and ODM services. Our engineering team can work with your specifications to develop custom products. Minimum order quantities for OEM start at 500-1000 units depending on complexity.
knowledge.q5_q: What payment terms do you accept?
knowledge.q5_a: We accept T/T (wire transfer), L/C (letter of credit), and for established partners, D/P or D/A. Standard terms are 30% deposit with 70% before shipment. Negotiable for long-term partners.
knowledge.q6_q: How do you ensure product quality?
knowledge.q6_a: We implement a 4-stage QC process: (1) Raw material inspection, (2) In-production random checks, (3) Pre-shipment inspection (PSI) by our QC team, (4) Container loading supervision. Third-party inspection (SGS, Bureau Veritas) is available upon request.
knowledge.q7_q: What shipping methods do you offer?
knowledge.q7_a: We offer sea freight (FCL/LCL), air freight, and express shipping (DHL, FedEx, UPS). Sea freight is most economical for large orders. Air freight recommended for urgent orders (3-7 days). Express for samples and small parcels (5-10 days).

knowledge.q8_a: Yes, we provide samples. Stock samples are available within 3-5 days. Custom samples take 10-15 days. Sample cost is negotiable and typically refundable for bulk orders.
